title: Xiphopteris villosissima
taxonomy: Xiphopteris villosissima belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a species of fern in the genus Xiphopteris. Xiphopteris villosissima is classified under the phylum Pteridophyta and the kingdom Plantae. This species is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. Its classification is part of the ongoing efforts to understand and categorize plant species.

This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and oxidative stress.
